import React from'react';import{useTranslation}from'react-i18next';import{formatCurrency}from'../utils/formatCurrency';// Single transaction item row
import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const TransactionItem=_ref=>{let{transaction,category,onDelete,onEdit}=_ref;const{t}=useTranslation();const isIncome=transaction.type==='income';return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transaction-item",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"transaction-icon",children:category?category.icon:'💸'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transaction-details",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"transaction-category",children:category?category.isDefault?t(category.nameKey):category.name:transaction.category}),transaction.note&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"transaction-note",children:transaction.note}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"transaction-date",children:transaction.date})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transaction-right",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transaction-amount ".concat(isIncome?'income':'expense'),children:[isIncome?'+':'-',formatCurrency(transaction.amount)]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"transaction-actions",children:[onEdit&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn-icon",onClick:()=>onEdit(transaction),title:"Edit",children:"\u270F\uFE0F"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn-icon btn-delete",onClick:()=>{if(window.confirm(t('transactions.confirmDelete'))){onDelete(transaction.id);}},title:t('transactions.delete'),children:"\uD83D\uDDD1\uFE0F"})]})]})]});};export default TransactionItem;
